reasoning: An analytic solution is available, so the primary criterion is the smallest L2 error. The plan_fdm_multigrid achieves the lowest L2 error (0.9831), closely followed by plan_fem_hp_adaptive (1.0269) and plan_spectral_lowres (1.6937). The runtime for plan_fdm_multigrid (65.77s) is also lower than plan_fem_hp_adaptive (75.72s) and only slightly higher than plan_spectral_lowres (61.03s). The plan_spectral_medres has extremely high error (138807.1), making it unsuitable. Therefore, plan_fdm_multigrid offers the best balance of accuracy and efficiency.
